title: The Ozempic Rebound Looks Catastrophic in Trials. Real-World Data Tells a Different Story — and the Gap Is the Story.
description: Clinical trials say stopping Ozempic or Mounjaro means rapid, near-total weight regain. A new real-world study of nearly 8,000 patients found something strikingly different — and the reason why exposes a fundamental flaw in how we've been reading the trial data all along. The rebound isn't a myth. But the catastrophe narrative may be.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Ozempic Rebound Looks Catastrophic in Trials. Real-World Data Tells a Different Story — and the Gap Is the Story.
